message:
fix(codegen): Skip VM fallback for subscript on local variables

Local variables (including function parameters) exist as Zig variables
and should not fall back to runtime.eval() for subscript operations,
even if their type is unknown.

Added func_local_vars check to the subscript case in needsVMFallback,
matching the existing pattern in the attribute case. This allows
subscript.zig to handle unknown-type containers using container_dispatch.

Fixes test_colorsys subscript on anytype parameters (tr1[0], tr2[0]).
